name: Sugarless Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Grated orange rind or 3/4 teaspoon Grated orange rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon (or cinnamon).
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the orange juice, grated orange rind, vegetable oil (minus 1 tablespoon), egg, chopped walnuts, and raisins.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, leaving about 2 inches between each cookie.
6. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
VARIATIONS: Add 1/4 teaspoon ground cloves for a spicy cookie. Instead of raisins, add 1/2 cup chopped or whole cranberries.
